name: @sudonym-btc/nmdk
description: Nostr Markets Development Kit aggregate repository.

scripts.build:nostr-tools: cd dependencies/nostr-tools && rm -rf lib && bun run build.js && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc
scripts.test:evm: cd dependencies/marketplace-evm-ts && npm run build && npm test
scripts.test:evm:integration: cd dependencies/marketplace-evm-ts && npm run build && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:nostr-tools && cd dependencies/marketplace-cashu-ts && npm run build && cd ../marketplace-evm-ts && npm run build && cd ../.. && node --test --test-concurrency=1 test/marketplace-driver-e2e.test.mjs
scripts.test:contracts: cd dependencies/marketplace-evm-contracts && npm run build && npm test
scripts.check:app: npm run build:nostr-tools && cd dependencies/marketplace-app-ts && npm run check
scripts.docs:dev: npm run docs:api && npm --workspace @sudonym-btc/nmdk-docs run dev
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:api && npm --workspace @sudonym-btc/nmdk-docs run build
scripts.docs:check: npm run docs:api && npm --workspace @sudonym-btc/nmdk-docs run types:check
